# AccessoryNotification.DisplayDate.hideDate

**Case**

An option that indicates the accessory doesn’t display a date.

## Declaration

```swift
case hideDate
```

## Identifying date display options

- **AccessoryNotification.DisplayDate.allDayDate(_:)**: An option to display a date for all-day events.
- **AccessoryNotification.DisplayDate.contentDate(_:)**: An option to display a date that includes a specific moment to which the notification refers.
- **AccessoryNotification.DisplayDate.deliveryDate**: An option to display a date that uses the notification’s delivery timestamp.

items.description: An option to display a date for all-day events.
items.name: AccessoryNotification.DisplayDate.allDayDate(_:)

items.description: An option to display a date that includes a specific moment to which the notification refers.
items.name: AccessoryNotification.DisplayDate.contentDate(_:)

items.description: An option to display a date that uses the notification’s delivery timestamp.
